title: Legacy Skin Packs
description: All your favorite console skin packs ported to Java!
body:
# Legacy Skin Packs [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-skin-packs) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/legacy-skin-packs) [](https://codeberg.org/Nostalgica-Reverie/Legacy-Skin-Packs) [](https://discord.com/invite/UsCEmuru9Z) Legacy Skin Packs is a resource pack made for mods [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) and [LegacySkins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins) that aims to bring back all the Skin Packs from the Legacy Console Editions of Minecraft. ## Thanks to:
Credits **MNTYROAD:** For recreating LCE models as CPM models, which were used to make SpawnOfZap, permdog99, and MacaroniWithTheMayonnaise's Skin packs. This project would not be possible without them. **Pigzone00:** For creating & maintaining the skin packs list, organization and the resource pack. **permdog99:** For recreating Skin packs 1, 2, 3, Minecraft 1st Birthday, Summer of Arcade, Halloween Charity, Battle & Beasts 1, 2 and helping to create the GitHub repo. **MacaroniWithTheMayonnaise:** For recreating Skin packs 1, 3, Halloween Charity, Playstation Skin Pack 1, 2, 3. **SpawnOfZap:** For recreating Skin packs Biome Settlers 1, Summer of Arcade. **Raiden:** For recreating Skin packs Minecraft 2nd, 3rd & 5th Birthday (4th on PS, Campfire Tales, 2nd Birthday - PS3, Villains, Noctis. **Lyn:** For recreating various Skin packs. **Pretzel:** For recreating Skin pack MINECON Earth 2017. **Lewis:** For recreating Skin packs Biome Settlers 1, Egyptian Mythology. **UltiMario:** For recreating Skin pack Minecon 2016 & fixing issues with animation from the Battle & Beasts 2 skin pack.
